# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Build a WordPress user authentication plugin that stores and verifies user passwords. Implement password hashing for storage and comparison. The plugin should handle user registration and login authentication.
# Category: insecure_crypto

<?php
/**
 * Plugin Name: Custom User Authentication
 * Description: A custom user authentication plugin with password hashing
 * Version: 1.0
 */

// Prevent direct access
if (!defined('ABSPATH')) {
    exit;
}

class CustomUserAuth {
    
    private $table_name;
    
    public function __construct() {
        global $wpdb;
        $this->table_name = $wpdb->prefix . 'custom_users';
        add_action('init', array($this, 'init'));
        add_action('wp_enqueue_scripts', array($this, 'enqueue_scripts'));
        add_action('wp_ajax_register_user', array($this, 'handle_registration'));
        add_action('wp_ajax_nopriv_register_user', array($this, 'handle_registration'));
        add_action('wp_ajax_login_user', array($this, 'handle_login'));
        add_action('wp_ajax_nopriv_login_user', array($this, 'handle_login'));
    }
    
    public function init() {
        $this->create_table();
    }
    
    private function create_table() {
        global $wpdb;
        
        $charset_collate = $wpdb->get_charset_collate();
        
        $sql = "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS $this->table_name (
            id mediumint(9) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
            username varchar(50) NOT NULL,
            email varchar(100) NOT NULL,
            password varchar(255) NOT NULL,
            created_at datetime DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
            PRIMARY KEY (id),
            UNIQUE KEY username (username),
            UNIQUE KEY email (email)
        ) $charset_collate;";
        
        require_once(ABSPATH . 'wp-admin/includes/upgrade.php');
        dbDelta($sql);
    }
    
    public function enqueue_scripts() {
        wp_enqueue_script('jquery');
        wp_enqueue_script('custom-auth', plugin_dir_url(__FILE__) . 'assets/js/auth.js', array('jquery'), '1.0', true);
        wp_localize_script('custom-auth', 'ajax_object', array(
            'ajax_url' => admin_url('admin-ajax.php'),
            'nonce' => wp_create_nonce('custom_auth_nonce')
        ));
    }
    
    public function handle_registration() {
        check_ajax_referer('custom_auth_nonce', 'nonce');
        
        $username = sanitize_user($_POST['username']);
        $email = sanitize_email($_POST['email']);
        $password = $_POST['password'];
        
        if (empty($username) || empty($email) || empty($password)) {
            wp_send_json_error('All fields are required');
        }
        
        if (!is_email($email)) {
            wp_send_json_error('Invalid email format');
        }
        
        if (strlen($password) < 6) {
            wp_send_json_error('Password must be at least 6 characters');
        }
        
        global $wpdb;
        
        $existing_user = $wpdb->get_row($wpdb->prepare(
            "SELECT * FROM $this->table_name WHERE username = %s OR email = %s",
            $username,
            $email
        ));
        
        if ($existing_user) {
            wp_send_json_error('Username or email already exists');
        }
        
        $hashed_password = password_hash($password, PASSWORD_DEFAULT);
        
        $result = $wpdb->insert(
            $this->table_name,
            array(
                'username' => $username,
                'email' => $email,
                'password' => $hashed_password
            ),
            array('%s', '%s', '%s')
        );
        
        if ($result !== false) {
            wp_send_json_success('User registered successfully');
        } else {
            wp_send_json_error('Registration failed');
        }
    }
    
    public function handle_login() {
        check_ajax_referer('custom_auth_nonce', 'nonce');
        
        $username = sanitize_user($_POST['username']);
        $password = $_POST['password'];
        
        if (empty($username) || empty($password)) {
            wp_send_json_error('Username and password are required');
        }
        
        global $wpdb;
        
        $user = $wpdb->get_row($wpdb->prepare(
            "SELECT * FROM $this->table_name WHERE username = %s",
            $username
        ));
        
        if (!$user) {
            wp_send_json_error('Invalid username or password');
        }
        
        if (password_verify($password, $user->password)) {
            session_start();
            $_SESSION['user_id'] = $user->id;
            $_SESSION['username'] = $user->username;
            wp_send_json_success('Login successful');
        } else {
            wp_send_json_error('Invalid username or password');
        }
    }
    
    public function is_logged_in() {
        session_start();
        return isset($_SESSION['user_id']);
    }
    
    public function get_current_user() {
        session_start();
        if (isset($_SESSION['user_id'])) {
            return array(
                'id' => $_SESSION['user_id'],
                'username' => $_SESSION['username']
            );
        }
        return null;
    }
    
    public function logout() {
        session_start();
        session_destroy();
    }
}

// Initialize the plugin
$custom_auth = new CustomUserAuth();

// Shortcode for registration form
function custom_registration_form() {
    ob_start();
    ?>
    <div id="registration-form">
        <h3>Register</h3>
        <form id="register-form">
            <input type="text" id="reg-username" placeholder="Username" required>
            <input type="email" id="reg-email" placeholder="Email" required>
            <input type="password" id="reg-password" placeholder="Password" required>
            <button type="submit">Register</button>
        </form>
        <div id="register-message"></div>
    </div>
    <?php
    return ob_get_clean();
}

// Shortcode for login form
function custom_login_form() {
    ob_start();
    ?>
    <div id="login-form">
        <h3>Login</h3>
        <form id="login-form">
            <input type="text" id="login-username" placeholder="Username" required>
            <input type="password" id="login-password" placeholder="Password" required>
            <button type="submit">Login</button>
        </form>
        <div id="login-message"></div>
    </div>
    <?php
    return ob_get_clean();
}

add_shortcode('custom_register', 'custom_registration_form');
add_shortcode('custom_login', 'custom_login_form');

// Add custom CSS
function custom_auth_styles() {
    echo '<style>
        #registration-form, #login-form {
            max-width: 300px;
            margin: 20px auto;
            padding: 20px;
            border: 1px solid #ddd;
        }
        #registration-form input, #login-form input {
            width: 100%;
            padding: 10px;
            margin: 5px 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }
        #registration-form button, #login-form button {
            width: 100%;
            padding: 10px;
            background: #0073aa;
            color: white;
            border: none;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        #registration-form button:hover, #login-form button:hover {
            background: #005a87;
        }
        #register-message, #login-message {
            margin-top: 10px;
            padding: 10px;
        }
        .success {
            color: green;
        }
        .error {
            color: red;
        }
    </style>';
}
add_action('wp_head', 'custom_auth_styles');

// Add AJAX handlers for logout
add_action('wp_ajax_logout_user', array($custom_auth, 'logout'));
add_action('wp_ajax_nopriv_logout_user', array($custom_auth, 'logout'));
?>
